include windows.inc

.code
;==============================================================================
; Initialize Virtual Tab Manager with Private Heap
;==============================================================================
TabManager_Init PROC
    LOCAL heapSize:QWORD
    
    ; Get process heap
    invoke GetProcessHeap
    mov [hProcessHeap], rax
    
    ; Create private heap for tabs (isolated, no serialization)
    mov [heapSize], HEAP_MAX_SIZE
    invoke HeapCreate, 
        HEAP_GENERATE_EXCEPTIONS or HEAP_NO_SERIALIZE,
        HEAP_INITIAL_SIZE, heapSize
    mov [hTabHeap], rax
    
    .if rax == NULL
        LOG_ERROR "Failed to create tab heap"
        xor rax, rax
        ret
    .endif
    
    ; Initialize hash table (64K buckets)
    invoke VirtualAlloc, NULL, HASH_TABLE_SIZE * 8,
        MEM_COMMIT or MEM_RESERVE, PAGE_READWRITE
    mov [tabHashTable], rax
    
    ; Zero hash table
    xor ecx, ecx
@zeroLoop:
    .if ecx >= HASH_TABLE_SIZE
        jmp @doneZero
    .endif
    mov QWORD PTR [rax + rcx * 8], 0
    inc ecx
    jmp @zeroLoop
@doneZero:
    
    ; Initialize LRU cache
    invoke VirtualAlloc, NULL, LRU_CACHE_SIZE * SIZEOF TabNode_t,
        MEM_COMMIT or MEM_RESERVE, PAGE_READWRITE
    mov [pLRUCache], rax
    
    ; Initialize thread pool
    invoke CreateThreadpool, NULL
    mov [hThreadPool], rax
    invoke SetThreadpoolThreadMaximum, rax, 4
    invoke SetThreadpoolThreadMinimum, rax, 2
    
    LOG_INFO "TabManager initialized: {} buckets, {} cache slots",
        HASH_TABLE_SIZE, LRU_CACHE_SIZE
    
    mov rax, 1          ; Success
    ret
TabManager_Init ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Create Virtual Tab (Placeholder, Not Loaded)
;==============================================================================
TabManager_CreateVirtualTab PROC lpFilePath:QWORD
    LOCAL fileHash:DWORD
    LOCAL pNode:PTR TabNode_t
    
    ; Hash file path
    call TabManager_HashPath, lpFilePath
    mov [fileHash], eax
    
    ; Check if already exists
    mov rax, [tabHashTable]
    mov rax, [rax + fileHash * 8]
    .if rax != NULL
        ; Tab already exists, return existing
        mov rax, [rax.TabNode_t.filePath]
        invoke lstrcmp, rax, lpFilePath
        .if eax == 0
            mov rax, [tabHashTable + fileHash * 8]
            ret
        .endif
    .endif
    
    ; Allocate node from heap
    invoke HeapAlloc, [hTabHeap], HEAP_ZERO_MEMORY,
        SIZEOF TabNode_t
    mov [pNode], rax
    
    .if rax == NULL
        LOG_ERROR "HeapAlloc failed for tab node"
        xor rax, rax
        ret
    .endif
    
    ; Initialize node
    mov rax, pNode
    mov rdx, lpFilePath
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.filePath], rdx
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.isLoaded], FALSE
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.loadStatus], LOAD_PENDING
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.lastAccessed], 0
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.lruPrev], 0
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.lruNext], 0
    
    ; Get file info
    invoke CreateFile, lpFilePath, GENERIC_READ,
        FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL, OPEN_EXISTING,
        FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL
    .if rax != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        mov [hFile], rax
        invoke GetFileSizeEx, rax, ADDR fileSizeBuffer
        invoke CloseHandle, [hFile]
        
        mov rax, fileSizeBuffer
        mov rdx, pNode
        mov [rdx.TabNode_t.fileSize], rax
    .endif
    
    ; Add to hash table
    mov rax, tabHashTable
    mov rcx, pNode
    mov [rax + fileHash * 8], rcx
    
    ; Add to LRU (as head)
    call LRU_AddNode, pNode
    
    ; Create UI placeholder (not loaded yet)
    call TabManager_CreateUITab, pNode
    
    inc [tabCount]
    
    mov rax, pNode
    ret
TabManager_CreateVirtualTab ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Hash Function (djb2 Algorithm)
;==============================================================================
TabManager_HashPath PROC lpPath:QWORD
    mov rax, 5381
    
@hashLoop:
    movzx r8b, BYTE PTR [lpPath]
    test r8b, r8b
    jz @done
    
    shl rax, 5
    add rax, r8
    inc lpPath
    jmp @hashLoop
    
@done:
    ; Modulo hash table size
    xor rdx, rdx
    mov ecx, HASH_TABLE_SIZE
    div ecx
    mov eax, edx                    ; Return index
    ret
TabManager_HashPath ENDP

;==============================================================================
; LRU Cache Management
;==============================================================================
LRU_AddNode PROC pNode:PTR TabNode_t
    mov rax, [lruHead]
    test rax, rax
    jnz @hasHead
    
    ; First node
    mov [lruHead], pNode
    mov [lruTail], pNode
    mov rax, pNode
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.lruPrev], 0
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.lruNext], 0
    jmp @incCount
    
@hasHead:
    ; Insert at head
    mov rax, lruHead
    mov rdx, pNode
    mov [rdx.TabNode_t.lruNext], rax
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.lruPrev], rdx
    mov [lruHead], rdx
    
@incCount:
    inc [lruNodeCount]
    
    ; Evict if over capacity
    mov eax, [lruNodeCount]
    cmp eax, LRU_CACHE_SIZE
    jg LRU_EvictTail
    
    ret
LRU_AddNode ENDP

LRU_EvictTail PROC
    mov rax, [lruTail]
    .if rax == NULL
        ret
    .endif
    
    ; Unload content but keep node in hash table
    mov [rax.TabNode_t.isLoaded], FALSE
    
    mov rax, [rax.TabNode_t.lruPrev]
    mov [lruTail], rax
    .if rax != NULL
        mov [rax.TabNode_t.lruNext], 0
    .endif
    
    dec [lruNodeCount]
    
    ret
LRU_EvictTail ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Activate Tab (Load if Not in Cache)
;==============================================================================
TabManager_ActivateTab PROC pNode:PTR TabNode_t
    mov rax, pNode
    .if [rax.TabNode_t.isLoaded] == FALSE
        ; Not loaded - check if in LRU
        call LRU_FindNode, pNode
        .if rax == NULL
            ; Need to load
            call TabManager_LoadTabAsync, pNode
            jmp @wait
        .endif
    .endif
    
    ; Already loaded or in cache - attach to editor
    jmp @attach
    
@wait:
    ; Wait for load (with timeout)
    mov ecx, 5000           ; 5 second timeout
@waitLoop:
    invoke Sleep, 10
    mov rax, pNode
    .if [rax.TabNode_t.isLoaded]
        jmp @attach
    .endif
    loop @waitLoop
    
    LOG_ERROR "Tab load timeout"
    xor rax, rax
    ret
    
@attach:
    ; Memory-map if not already
    mov rax, pNode
    .if [rax.TabNode_t.pMappedMemory] == NULL
        call TabManager_MemoryMapFile, pNode
    .endif
    
    ; Move to head of LRU
    call LRU_MoveToHead, pNode
    
    ; Attach to Scintilla
    mov rax, pNode
    invoke SendMessage, [hScintilla], SCI_SETTEXT, 0,
        [rax.TabNode_t.pMappedMemory]
    
    ; Update recent files list
    call TabManager_UpdateRecentFiles, pNode
    
    mov rax, 1
    ret
TabManager_ActivateTab ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Save Session (Persist Tab State)
;==============================================================================
TabManager_SaveSession PROC
    LOCAL hFile:HANDLE
    LOCAL bytesWritten:QWORD
    
    invoke CreateFile, OFFSET szSessionPath,
        GENERIC_WRITE, 0, NULL, CREATE_ALWAYS,
        FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL
    mov [hFile], rax
    
    .if rax == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        LOG_ERROR "Failed to create session file"
        xor rax, rax
        ret
    .endif
    
    ; Write tab count
    mov edx, [tabCount]
    invoke WriteFile, [hFile], ADDR [tabCount], 4,
        ADDR bytesWritten, NULL
    
    ; Write each tab's path and scroll position
    xor ecx, ecx
@writeLoop:
    cmp ecx, HASH_TABLE_SIZE
    jge @done
    
    mov rax, [tabHashTable]
    mov rax, [rax + rcx * 8]
    .if rax != NULL
        ; Write path length
        mov rdx, [rax.TabNode_t.filePath]
        invoke lstrlen, rdx
        invoke WriteFile, [hFile], ADDR eax, 4,
            ADDR bytesWritten, NULL
        
        ; Write path
        mov rdx, [rax.TabNode_t.filePath]
        invoke WriteFile, [hFile], rdx, eax,
            ADDR bytesWritten, NULL
        
        ; Write scroll position
        mov rdx, [rax.TabNode_t.scrollPos]
        invoke WriteFile, [hFile], ADDR rdx, 8,
            ADDR bytesWritten, NULL
    .endif
    
    inc ecx
    jmp @writeLoop
    
@done:
    invoke CloseHandle, [hFile]
    
    LOG_INFO "Session saved: {} tabs", [tabCount]
    
    ret
TabManager_SaveSession ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Load Session (Restore Tabs)
;==============================================================================
TabManager_LoadSession PROC
    LOCAL hFile:HANDLE
    LOCAL bytesRead:QWORD
    
    invoke CreateFile, OFFSET szSessionPath,
        GENERIC_READ, FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL, OPEN_EXISTING,
        FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL
    
    .if rax == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        LOG_INFO "No session file found, starting fresh"
        ret
    .endif
    mov [hFile], rax
    
    ; Read tab count
    invoke ReadFile, [hFile], ADDR [tabCount], 4,
        ADDR bytesRead, NULL
    
    ; Read each tab
    xor ecx, ecx
@readLoop:
    cmp ecx, [tabCount]
    jge @done
    
    ; Read path length
    invoke ReadFile, [hFile], ADDR pathLength, 4,
        ADDR bytesRead, NULL
    
    ; Read path
    invoke ReadFile, [hFile], ADDR filePath, [pathLength],
        ADDR bytesRead, NULL
    mov BYTE PTR [filePath + pathLength], 0
    
    ; Read scroll position
    invoke ReadFile, [hFile], ADDR scrollPos, 8,
        ADDR bytesRead, NULL
    
    ; Create virtual tab
    call TabManager_CreateVirtualTab, ADDR filePath
    
    inc ecx
    jmp @readLoop
    
@done:
    invoke CloseHandle, [hFile]
    
    LOG_INFO "Session loaded: {} tabs", [tabCount]
    
    ret
TabManager_LoadSession ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Populate Root Drives (C:\, D:\ etc.)
;==============================================================================
FileBrowser_PopulateRoot PROC
    LOCAL buffer[256]:BYTE
    LOCAL drives:DWORD
    
    ; Get logical drives bitmask
    invoke GetLogicalDrives
    mov [drives], eax
    
    xor ecx, ecx            ; Drive letter counter
    
@driveLoop:
    cmp ecx, 26
    je @done
    
    ; Check if drive exists
    mov eax, [drives]
    bt eax, ecx
    jnc @nextDrive
    
    ; Build drive string
    mov [buffer], 'A'
    add [buffer], cl
    mov BYTE PTR [buffer + 1], ':'
    mov BYTE PTR [buffer + 2], '\'
    mov BYTE PTR [buffer + 3], 0
    
    ; Get drive type
    invoke GetDriveType, ADDR buffer
    .if eax == DRIVE_FIXED || eax == DRIVE_REMOTE
        call FileBrowser_AddRootItem, ADDR buffer
    .endif
    
@nextDrive:
    inc ecx
    jmp @driveLoop
    
@done:
    ret
FileBrowser_PopulateRoot ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Add Root Drive Item
;==============================================================================
FileBrowser_AddRootItem PROC lpDrive:QWORD
    LOCAL tvinsert:TVINSERTSTRUCT
    LOCAL volumeName[128]:BYTE

        ADDR volumeName, 128,
        NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0
    
    ; Format display string

    ; Insert item

    mov [tvinsert.hInsertAfter], TVI_ROOT
    mov [tvinsert.item.mask], TVIF_TEXT or TVIF_IMAGE or 
        TVIF_SELECTEDIMAGE or TVIF_PARAM
    lea rax, displayBuffer

;==============================================================================
; On Item Expanding (Lazy Load Directory)
;==============================================================================
FileBrowser_OnItemExpanding PROC hTreeItem:QWORD
    LOCAL findData:WIN32_FIND_DATA
    LOCAL hFind:HANDLE
    LOCAL searchPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    
    ; Get item path
    call FileBrowser_GetItemPath, hTreeItem
    mov [searchPath], rax
    
    ; Append \*
    invoke lstrcat, ADDR searchPath, OFFSET szWildcard
    
    ; Find first file
    invoke FindFirstFile, ADDR searchPath, ADDR findData
    mov [hFind], rax
    
    .if rax == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        ret
    .endif
    
    ; Insert items
@fileLoop:
    ; Skip . and ..
    lea rax, findData.cFileName
    invoke lstrcmp, rax, OFFSET szDot
    .if eax == 0
        jmp @next
    .endif
    invoke lstrcmp, rax, OFFSET szDotDot
    .if eax == 0
        jmp @next
    .endif
    
    ; Check if directory
    .if [findData.dwFileAttributes] & FILE_ATTRIBUTE_DIRECTORY
        call FileBrowser_AddDirectoryItem, 
            hTreeItem, ADDR findData.cFileName
    .else
        call FileBrowser_AddFileItem,
            hTreeItem, ADDR findData.cFileName
    .endif
    
@next:
    invoke FindNextFile, [hFind], ADDR findData
    .if rax != FALSE
        jmp @fileLoop
    .endif
    
    invoke FindClose, [hFind]
    
    ret
FileBrowser_OnItemExpanding ENDP

    mov [tvinsert.hInsertAfter], TVI_LAST

    mov [tvinsert.item.cChildren], 1  ; Has children
    
    ; Format: "Folder (100,000 items)"

        OFFSET szVirtualFormat,
        lpPath, [itemCount]

    ; Store path and virtual flag in lParam
    alloc_mem SIZEOF VirtualNodeInfo
    mov [rax.VirtualNodeInfo.path], lpPath
    mov [rax.VirtualNodeInfo.isVirtual], TRUE
    mov [rax.VirtualNodeInfo.totalCount], itemCount
    
    mov [tvinsert.item.lParam], rax
    
    invoke SendMessage, [hFileTree], TVM_INSERTITEM, 0,
        ADDR tvinsert
    
    ret

            ; Check for close button click
            call Tab_GetCloseButtonRect, wParam, lParam
            .if eax == TRUE
                call Tab_CloseAtPosition, wParam, lParam
                ret 0
            .endif
    
        CASE WM_RBUTTONUP

            ret 0
    
        CASE WM_PAINT
            call Tab_OnPaint, hWnd
            ret 0
    ENDSW
    
    ; Call original proc
    invoke CallWindowProc, [oldTabProc], hWnd, uMsg, wParam, lParam
    ret

    invoke FillRect, [hdc], ADDR rect, rax
    invoke DeleteObject, rax
    
    ; Draw tab text
    mov [tcitem.mask], TCIF_TEXT
    lea rax, tabTextBuffer
    mov [tcitem.pszText], rax
    mov [tcitem.cchTextMax], 256
    invoke SendMessage, hWnd, TCM_GETITEM, ecx, ADDR tcitem
    
    invoke SetBkMode, [hdc], TRANSPARENT
    invoke DrawText, [hdc], ADDR tabTextBuffer, -1, ADDR rect,
        DT_CENTER or DT_VCENTER
    
    ; Draw close button
    invoke GetSysColor, COLOR_WINDOWTEXT
    invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], eax
    mov eax, rect.right
    sub eax, 15
    mov rect.left, eax
    mov eax, rect.top
    add eax, 3
    mov rect.top, eax
    
    invoke DrawText, [hdc], OFFSET szCloseX, 1, ADDR rect,
        DT_CENTER or DT_VCENTER
    
    inc ecx
    jmp @paintLoop
    
@endPaint:
    invoke EndPaint, hWnd, ADDR ps
    
    ret
Tab_OnPaint ENDP

.code
;==============================================================================
; Show Toast Notification (Agent Task Complete, etc.)
;==============================================================================
Toast_Show PROC lpTitle:QWORD, lpMessage:QWORD, type:DWORD
    LOCAL wc:WNDCLASSEX
    LOCAL hWndToast:HWND
   LOCAL pt:POINT
    
    ; Position at bottom-right corner
    invoke GetCursorPos, ADDR pt
    invoke GetSystemMetrics, SM_CXSCREEN
    sub eax, 350            ; 350px from right
    mov [toastX], eax
    invoke GetSystemMetrics, SM_CYSCREEN
    sub eax, 100            ; 100px from bottom
    mov [toastY], eax
    
    ; Register toast window class
    mov [wc.cbSize], SIZEOF WNDCLASSEX
    mov [wc.style], CS_HREDRAW or CS_VREDRAW
    lea rax, Toast_WndProc
    mov [wc.lpfnWndProc], rax
    mov [wc.cbWndExtra], SIZEOF QWORD
    mov rax, [hInstance]
    mov [wc.hInstance], rax
    mov [wc.hbrBackground], 00E0E0E0h
    lea rax, szToastClass
    mov [wc.lpszClassName], rax
    
    invoke RegisterClassEx, ADDR wc
    
    ; Create toast
    invoke CreateWindowEx,
        WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW or WS_EX_TOPMOST or WS_EX_NOACTIVATE,
        OFFSET szToastClass,
        lpTitle,
        WS_POPUPWINDOW or WS_VISIBLE,
        [toastX], [toastY],
        320, 80,
        NULL, NULL, [hInstance], NULL
    mov [hWndToast], rax
    
    ; Store message in window extra bytes
    invoke SetWindowLongPtr, rax, 0, lpMessage
    
    ; Animate in (slide up)
    call Toast_AnimateIn, hWndToast
    
    ; Auto-hide after 5 seconds
    invoke SetTimer, hWndToast, 100, 5000, NULL
    
    ret
Toast_Show ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Toast Window Procedure
;==============================================================================
Toast_WndProc PROC hWnd:QWORD, uMsg:QWORD, wParam:QWORD, lParam:QWORD
    SWITCH uMsg
        CASE WM_TIMER
            .if wParam == 100
                call Toast_AnimateOut, hWnd
                invoke KillTimer, hWnd, 100
            .endif
            ret 0
            
        CASE WM_PAINT
            call Toast_OnPaint, hWnd
            ret 0
            
        CASE WM_DESTROY
            invoke PostQuitMessage, 0
            ret 0
    ENDSW
    
    invoke DefWindowProc, hWnd, uMsg, wParam, lParam
    ret
Toast_WndProc ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Animate Toast (Slide Up + Fade In)
;==============================================================================
Toast_AnimateIn PROC hWnd:QWORD
    LOCAL pt:POINT
    
    ; Start position (off-screen bottom)
    invoke GetWindowRect, hWnd, ADDR rect
    mov [toastStartY], [rect.bottom]
    mov eax, [toastY]
    add eax, 80
    mov [rect.top], eax
    
    ; Animate over 300ms
    mov [animationStep], 0
    
@animateLoop:
    invoke Sleep, 10
    inc [animationStep]
    
    mov eax, [toastStartY]
    sub eax, [toastY]
    imul eax, [animationStep]
    mov ecx, 30
    div ecx
    sub [toastStartY], eax
    
    invoke SetWindowPos, hWnd, NULL,
        [toastX], [toastStartY], 0, 0,
        SWP_NOZORDER or SWP_NOSIZE
    
    .if [animationStep] < 30
        jmp @animateLoop
    .endif
    
    ret
Toast_AnimateIn ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Paint Toast (Gradient Background + Icon)
;==============================================================================
Toast_OnPaint PROC hWnd:QWORD
    LOCAL ps:PAINTSTRUCT
    LOCAL rect:RECT
    LOCAL hdc:HDC
    LOCAL hBrush:HBRUSH
    LOCAL lpMessage:QWORD
    
    invoke BeginPaint, hWnd, ADDR ps
    mov [hdc], rax
    
    invoke GetClientRect, hWnd, ADDR rect
    
    ; Gradient fill
    invoke CreateSolidBrush, 00000000h
    mov [hBrush], rax
    
    ; Draw rounded rect
    invoke RoundRect, [hdc], rect.left, rect.top,
        rect.right, rect.bottom, 8, 8
    
    invoke DeleteObject, [hBrush]
    
    ; Draw icon based on type
    call Toast_DrawIcon, hWnd
    
    ; Draw message
    invoke GetWindowLongPtr, hWnd, 0
    mov [lpMessage], rax
    
    invoke SetBkMode, [hdc], TRANSPARENT
    invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], 00FFFFFFh
    invoke DrawText, [hdc], [lpMessage], -1, ADDR rect,
        DT_CENTER or DT_VCENTER or DT_SINGLELINE
    
    invoke EndPaint, hWnd, ADDR ps
    
    ret
Toast_OnPaint ENDP

; Data
;==============================================================================
.data
szToastClass      db 'RawrXD_Toast',0
szToastFormat     db '%s: %s',0
toastX            dd 0
toastY            dd 0
toastStartY       dd 0
animationStep     dd 0
rect              RECT <>

END

;==============================================================================
; Create Circular Action Button
;==============================================================================

                               cmdId:DWORD, color:COLORREF
    LOCAL x:DWORD
    LOCAL y:DWORD
    LOCAL btnWnd:HWND
    
    ; Calculate position (vertical stack)
    mov eax, index
    mov ecx, 60             ; Button height + padding
    mul ecx
    add eax, 10             ; Top margin
    mov [y], eax
    
    ; Create button (owner-drawn)
    invoke CreateWindowEx, 0, OFFSET szButtonClass, lpText,
        WS_CHILD or WS_VISIBLE or BS_OWNERDRAW,
        5, [y], 40, 40,
        [hQuickActions], cmdId, [hInstance], NULL
    mov [btnWnd], rax

;==============================================================================
; Button Paint (Owner-Drawn Circular)
;==============================================================================
QuickActions_ButtonPaint PROC hDlg:QWORD, lpDrawItem:QWORD
    LOCAL rect:RECT
    LOCAL hBrush:HBRUSH
    LOCAL hPen:HPEN
    LOCAL oldBrush:QWORD
    LOCAL oldPen:QWORD
    
    mov rax, lpDrawItem
    mov [hdc], [rax.DRAWITEMSTRUCT.hDC]
    mov [rect], [rax.DRAWITEMSTRUCT.rcItem]
    
    ; Get color from user data
    invoke GetWindowLongPtr, [rax.DRAWITEMSTRUCT.hwndItem],
        GWLP_USERDATA
    mov [btnColor], eax
    
    ; Create brush and pen
    invoke CreateSolidBrush, [btnColor]
    mov [hBrush], rax
    invoke CreatePen, PS_NULL, 0, 0
    mov [hPen], rax
    
    ; Select into DC
    invoke SelectObject, [hdc], [hBrush]
    mov [oldBrush], rax
    invoke SelectObject, [hdc], [hPen]
    mov [oldPen], rax
    
    ; Draw circle
    invoke Ellipse, [hdc], rect.left, rect.top,
        rect.right, rect.bottom
    
    ; Draw icon/text
    invoke DrawText, [hdc], [rax.DRAWITEMSTRUCT.hwndItem],
        -1, ADDR rect, DT_CENTER or DT_VCENTER
    
    ; Restore DC
    invoke SelectObject, [hdc], [oldBrush]
    invoke SelectObject, [hdc], [oldPen]
    
    ; Delete objects
    invoke DeleteObject, [hBrush]
    invoke DeleteObject, [hPen]
    
    ret
QuickActions_ButtonPaint ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Create Performance Overlay (Top-Right Corner)
;==============================================================================
PerformanceOverlay_Create PROC
    invoke CreateWindowEx,
        WS_EX_TOPMOST or WS_EX_TRANSPARENT or WS_EX_LAYERED,
        OFFSET szPerfClass,
        NULL,
        WS_POPUP or WS_VISIBLE,
        0, 0, 200, 60,
        [hMainWnd], NULL, [hInstance], NULL
    mov [hPerfWnd], rax
    
    ; Set transparency
    invoke SetLayeredWindowAttributes, rax, 0,
        200, LWA_ALPHA
    
    ; Start timer (100ms = 10 FPS update)
    invoke SetTimer, rax, 1, 100, NULL
    
    ret
PerformanceOverlay_Create ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Window Procedure
;==============================================================================
PerformanceOverlay_WndProc PROC hWnd:QWORD, uMsg:QWORD,
                                  wParam:QWORD, lParam:QWORD
    SWITCH uMsg
        CASE WM_TIMER
            .if wParam == 1
                call PerformanceOverlay_Update
            .endif
            ret 0
            
        CASE WM_PAINT
            call PerformanceOverlay_OnPaint
            ret 0
    ENDSW
    
    invoke DefWindowProc, hWnd, uMsg, wParam, lParam
    ret
PerformanceOverlay_WndProc ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Update Performance Metrics
;==============================================================================
PerformanceOverlay_Update PROC
    LOCAL pmc:PROCESS_MEMORY_COUNTERS
    LOCAL fps:DWORD
    LOCAL frameTime:DWORD
    
    ; Calculate FPS
    invoke QueryPerformanceCounter, ADDR currentTime
    mov rax, currentTime
    sub rax, lastTime
    mov frameTime, eax
    mov lastTime, currentTime
    
    .if frameTime > 0
        mov eax, 10000000
        xor edx, edx
        div frameTime
        mov [fps], eax
    .else
        mov [fps], 0
    .endif
    
    ; Get memory usage
    invoke GetProcessMemoryInfo, GetCurrentProcess(),
        ADDR pmc, SIZEOF pmc
    
    ; Update display strings
    invoke wsprintf, ADDR fpsBuffer, OFFSET szFPSFormat, [fps]
    mov rax, pmc.WorkingSetSize
    xor rdx, rdx
    mov ecx, 1048576    ; Convert to MB
    div rcx
    invoke wsprintf, ADDR memBuffer, OFFSET szMemFormat, eax
    
    ; Force repaint
    invoke InvalidateRect, [hPerfWnd], NULL, FALSE
    
    ret
PerformanceOverlay_Update ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Paint Overlay (Transparent Background)
;==============================================================================
PerformanceOverlay_OnPaint PROC
    LOCAL ps:PAINTSTRUCT
    LOCAL rect:RECT
    
    invoke BeginPaint, [hPerfWnd], ADDR ps
    mov [hdc], rax
    
    invoke GetClientRect, [hPerfWnd], ADDR rect
    
    ; Fill with semi-transparent black
    invoke CreateSolidBrush, 00000000h
    invoke FillRect, [hdc], ADDR rect, rax
    invoke DeleteObject, rax
    
    ; Draw FPS
    invoke SetBkMode, [hdc], TRANSPARENT
    invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], 0000FF00h  ; Green
    invoke TextOut, [hdc], 10, 10,
        ADDR fpsBuffer, [fpsLen]
    
    ; Draw memory
    invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], 0000FFFFh  ; Yellow
    invoke TextOut, [hdc], 10, 30,
        ADDR memBuffer, [memLen]
    
    invoke EndPaint, [hPerfWnd], ADDR ps
    
    ret
PerformanceOverlay_OnPaint ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Data
;==============================================================================
.data
szPerfClass        db 'RawrXD_PerformanceOverlay',0
hPerfWnd           dq ?
hdc                dq ?

; Time tracking
currentTime        dq ?
lastTime           dq ?

; Display buffers
fpsBuffer          db 32 dup(?)
memBuffer          db 32 dup(?)
fpsLen             dd 0
memLen             dd 0

; Format strings
szFPSFormat        db '%d FPS',0
szMemFormat        db '%d MB',0

END

include windows.inc

.code
;==============================================================================
; Initialize Semantic Highlighter
;==============================================================================
SemanticHighlight_Init PROC hSci:QWORD
    ; Register for document change notifications
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETMODEVENTMASK,
        SC_MOD_INSERTTEXT or SC_MOD_DELETETEXT, 0
    
    ; Set lexer
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETLEXER, SCLEX_CPP, 0
    
    ; Set up keyword sets
    call SemanticHighlight_SetupKeywords, hSci
    
    ; Configure semantic highlighting
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETPROPERTY,
        "lexer.cpp.track.preprocessor", "1"
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETPROPERTY,
        "lexer.cpp.update.preprocessor", "1"
    
    ret
SemanticHighlight_Init ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Set Up C++ Keywords
;==============================================================================
SemanticHighlight_SetupKeywords PROC hSci:QWORD
    ; Primary keywords (if, else, while, etc.)
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETKEYWORDS, 0,
        OFFSET szCppKeywords
    
    ; Types (int, float, class, etc.)
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETKEYWORDS, 1,
        OFFSET szCppTypes
    
    ; Preprocessor directives
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETKEYWORDS, 2,
        OFFSET szCppDirectives
    
    ; User-defined types (from CodebaseIndexer)
    call SemanticHighlight_LoadUserTypes, hSci
    
    ret
SemanticHighlight_SetupKeywords ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Load User-Defined Types from Codebase Index
;==============================================================================
SemanticHighlight_LoadUserTypes PROC hSci:QWORD
    LOCAL typesBuffer[4096]:BYTE
    LOCAL bufferPos:DWORD
    
    mov [bufferPos], 0
    
    ; Get all class/struct names from indexer
    invoke CodebaseIndexer_GetAllSymbols, "class"
    mov [pClasses], rax
    
    ; Append to buffer
    mov rcx, rax
@classLoop:
    .if [rcx.Symbol.name] == NULL
        jmp @doneClasses
    .endif
    
    invoke lstrcat, ADDR typesBuffer, [rcx.Symbol.name]
    invoke lstrcat, ADDR typesBuffer, OFFSET szSpace
    
    add rcx, SIZEOF Symbol
    jmp @classLoop
    
@doneClasses:
    ; Set as keyword set 3
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_SETKEYWORDS, 3,
        ADDR typesBuffer
    
    ret
SemanticHighlight_LoadUserTypes ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Handle Document Change (Retokenize Affected Region)
;==============================================================================
SemanticHighlight_OnDocChange PROC hSci:QWORD, position:DWORD,
                                          length:DWORD, linesAdded:DWORD
    ; Get visible range
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_GETFIRSTVISIBLELINE
    mov [firstLine], eax
    
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_LINESONSCREEN
    add eax, [firstLine]
    mov [lastLine], eax
    
    ; Calculate affected lines
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_LINEFROMPOSITION, position
    mov [startLine], eax
    
    mov eax, position
    add eax, length
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_LINEFROMPOSITION, eax
    mov [endLine], eax
    
    ; Expand to visible range
    mov eax, [startLine]
    cmp eax, [firstLine]
    cmovg eax, [firstLine]
    mov [startLine], eax
    
    mov eax, [endLine]
    cmp eax, [lastLine]
    cmovl eax, [lastLine]
    mov [endLine], eax
    
    ; Colorise affected range
    invoke SendMessage, hSci, SCI_COLOURISE,
        SCI_POSITIONFROMLINE, [startLine],
        SCI_POSITIONFROMLINE, [endLine]
    
    ret
SemanticHighlight_OnDocChange ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Data
;==============================================================================
.data
; Keyword strings
szCppKeywords      db 'if else while for do switch case break continue return',0
szCppTypes         db 'int float double char bool void class struct union enum',0
szCppDirectives    db '#include #define #ifdef #ifndef #endif #pragma',0
szSpace            db ' ',0

; Visible range
firstLine          dd 0
lastLine           dd 0
startLine          dd 0
endLine            dd 0

; Symbol list (from indexer)
pClasses           dq ?
Symbol STRUCT
    name   dq ?
    type   dq ?
    line   dd ?
Symbol ENDS

END

;==============================================================================
; Create LSP Status Widget (Bottom-Left)
;==============================================================================
LspStatus_Create PROC
    invoke CreateWindowEx,
        0,
        OFFSET szStaticClass,
        OFFSET szLSPDisconnected,
        WS_CHILD or WS_VISIBLE or SS_SIMPLE,
        10, [statusBarHeight] + 10,
        120, 20,
        [hMainWnd], IDC_LSP_STATUS, [hInstance], NULL
    mov [hLspStatus], rax
    
    ; Start status check timer (5 seconds)
    invoke SetTimer, rax, 100, 5000, NULL
    
    ret
LspStatus_Create ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Update LSP Status (Connected/Disconnected/Indexing)
;==============================================================================
LspStatus_Update PROC status:DWORD
    LOCAL buffer[128]:BYTE
    
    mov eax, status
    
    .if eax == LSP_STATUS_CONNECTING
        lea rax, szLSPConnecting
    .elseif eax == LSP_STATUS_CONNECTED
        lea rax, szLSPConnected
    .elseif eax == LSP_STATUS_INDEXING
        lea rax, szLSPIndexing
    .else
        lea rax, szLSPDisconnected
    .endif
    
    invoke SetWindowText, [hLspStatus], rax
    
    ; Update color based on status
    invoke GetDC, [hLspStatus]
    mov [hdc], rax
    
    .if eax == LSP_STATUS_CONNECTED
        invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], 0000FF00h  ; Green
    .elseif eax == LSP_STATUS_CONNECTING || eax == LSP_STATUS_INDEXING
        invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], 0000FFFFh  ; Yellow
    .else
        invoke SetTextColor, [hdc], 000000FFh  ; Red
    .endif
    
    invoke ReleaseDC, [hLspStatus], rax
    
    ret
LspStatus_Update ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Window Procedure
;==============================================================================
LspStatus_WndProc PROC hWnd:QWORD, uMsg:QWORD, wParam:QWORD, lParam:QWORD
    SWITCH uMsg
        CASE WM_TIMER
            .if wParam == 100
                call LspStatus_CheckConnection
            .endif
            ret 0
    ENDSW
    
    invoke DefWindowProc, hWnd, uMsg, wParam, lParam
    ret
LspStatus_WndProc ENDP

;==============================================================================
; Check LSP Connection (Ping)
;==============================================================================
LspStatus_CheckConnection PROC
    LOCAL pong:DWORD
    
    invoke LanguageServerIntegration_Ping
    mov [pong], eax
    
    .if pong == 0
        call LspStatus_Update, LSP_STATUS_DISCONNECTED
    .else
        call LspStatus_Update, LSP_STATUS_CONNECTED
    .endif
    
    ret
LspStatus_CheckConnection ENDP

LSP_STATUS_CONNECTING   equ 1
